DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF MICHELLE BANKS IS OVERRULED. THE COMPLAINT ADEQUATELY PLEADS A CLAIM FOR INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. SOME CONDUCT WAS ALLEGED TO HAVE BEEN SPECIFICALLY DIRECTED AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND THAT ALLEGED CONDUCT WAS SUFFICIENTLY OUTRAGEOUS FOR THE PLEADING STAGE. ORDER SIGNED. OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-03-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT APARTMENT INVESTMENT AND MANAGEMENT COMPANY, ALL HALLOWS PRESERVATION, L.P., NHPMN MANAGEMENT, L. P. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT of plaintiff Michelle Banks is OVERRULED. The complaint adequately pleads a claim for intentional infliction of emotional distress. Some conduct was alleged to have been specifically directed against plaintiff and that alleged conduct was sufficiently outrageous for the pleading stage. Order signed. Judge: Richard Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Gena Eales, CSR No. 9176, email: geales@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS APARTMENT INVESTMENT AND MANAGEMENT COMPANY, ALL HALLOWS PRESERVATION, L.P. AND NHPMN MANAGEMENT, L.P.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is ordered OFF CALENDAR for failure to comply with CCP 430.41, which provides that "the demurring party shall meet and confer in person or by telephone with the party who filed the pleading." Both sides' counsel are ordered to comply with the statute. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/ru
